headline: Can Meta turn AI capacity into a $1 trillion market opportunity?
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America reiterated its Buy rating on Meta Platforms and maintained an $835 price target, arguing that emerging signs of AI monetization and enterprise adoption could help improve investor sentiment after months of concern over the company’s rising spending commitments.

headline: Can Meta Stock Reach $1,500 by 2030?
summary: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) just reported one of the strangest quarters in mega-cap tech. Revenue grew 33.08% to $56.31 billion, advertising surged 33% year-over-year, and CEO Mark Zuckerberg told investors “We’re on track to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of people.” Yet shares are down 7.47% year-to-date and sit at $610.26. The question I want to ... Can Meta Stock Reach $1,500 by 2030?
